llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 13.1 (Recognition of Classified Employees) was moved from its original position to before oral communication. Item 6.1 (Approval of Bond Program Consent Items) was moved from consent to action due to public comments. Items 6.2 and 6.3 were moved to action. Board president also added a quick staff recognition under 13.1 to recognize Wendy Kelly as Region 5 Administrator of the Year.
